drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
when
    ( T0($b0_0_0 : f1) and T0(f2 == false) and T0(f0 > -2) )
    or
    ( T0($b0_0_0 : f1) and T0(f2 == false) and T0(f0 >= -2.0) )
then
    insertLogical(new T1(-1000000007, $b0_0_0, 9));
end
rule "R1"
when
    ( T0($b1_0_0 : f1) and T0(f2 == false) and T0(f0 > -2) )
    or
    ( T0($b1_0_0 : f1) and T0(f2 == false) and T0(f0 > -2) )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -9
no-loop
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f0 <= -5, f1 == 4.5, f2 == false)
    exists T0(f1 != -2.5 || f1 < -3.0 || !(f0 < 2))
then
    modify($p2_0) { setF2(true) }
end
rule "R3"
salience 6
when
    $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f0)
    T1(f2 >= 4, f2 != $b3_0_0)
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0(f0 not in (4.0) || f0 == -1 || !(f2 != false), $b4_0_0 : f2, f2 == false)
then
    modify($p4_0) { setF2(true), setF1(3.0) }
end
rule "R5"
when
    $p5_0 : T0(f1 >= 3.0, !(f1 not in (8, 3.0, 1.5)), $b5_0_0 : f1, $b5_0_1 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    modify($p5_0) { setF2(true) }
end
